apiContracts.description: Stateless liveness-probe endpoint. Returns HTTP 200 with body {"status": "ok"}. No authentication required — this is a public health-check endpoint. No request parameters, no request body. Implemented by PingService.getPing() behind pingRoutes (Fastify route registration, Phase 3).

componentSpecs.name: IPingService
componentSpecs.description: Service interface for the ping health-check module. Defines a single method getPing() that returns a PingResponse with status 'ok'. The concrete implementation (PingService, Phase 2) is stateless — no constructor dependencies, no database access. Follows the exact pattern of IUptimeService in the uptime module.
